calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as a reassignment from the Master Calendar for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
David Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff: B. D. Thakor, also present.
Mary Catherine Wiederhold, Esq. for Defendant: Deloris Frisco, also present.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff agreed to repair the light switch before Oct. 4, 2005.
On or before Dec. 1, 2005 at 6:00 A.M., Defendant to vacate the premises located at 118 Taylor St., #205, San Francisco.
Plaintiff to provide a $900.00 check for move out payment.
Parties released each other from all claims and Plaintiff to dismissed the action with prejudice. Each to bear own costs and fees, terms of the settlement to remain confidential.
If defendant fail to vacate, upon 2 court days of written and telepone notice to defendant's counsel, motion for Judgment.
Mr. Mendez to reduced to writting.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled by the Court and Trial date vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID MENDEZ FOR PLAINTIFF B.D.THAKOR
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY RUDY BALDERAMA FOR DEFENDANT DELORIS FRISCO

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS
